data.title: Milestone 1: Skeleton + DB (FastAPI, SQLModel §5 schema, Alembic, /health, Docker Postgres)

data.body: Review (fresh-context sub-agent): PASS. Live-verified: ruff clean, mypy clean (5 files), pytest 1 passed in 0.64s (fast — 127.0.0.1 DSN fix confirmed). Postgres healthy; all 9 tables present (agents, tools, agent_tools, runs, trace_events, approvals, memory_candidates, memories + alembic_version). alembic downgrade -1 + upgrade head both succeed (real downgrade()). DB-down behavior verified: app imports without DB (lazy engine), /health returns 200 {status:ok,db:error} — no 500. Schema matches §5 exactly incl. agent_tools composite-PK join + fattened trace_events; runs.parent_run_id self-FK correct. No secrets/.venv/__pycache__ committed; uv.lock + migration committed. No scope creep (no broker/tools/loop/ask). 3 cosmetic nits; applied 2 inline (removed redundant versions/.gitkeep + dangling alembic.ini comment); 3rd is an external Starlette deprecation warning (not project code). -> done.
